name: desk_organiser_mesh_preserved_drawers
description: Mesh-preserved functional drawer conversion for the child-designed desk organiser. The original MakerLab surface mesh is partitioned across the fixed body and drawer fronts so the drawing-derived definition remains in the final output.

design_intent.silhouette: preserve the original drawing-derived desk organiser mesh while making the visible drawer side functional
design_intent.visual_style: child-designed organiser with the original MakerLab surface definition retained
design_intent.surface_continuity: source mesh triangles are partitioned without smoothing, decimation, redrawing, or remeshing
cross_sections: front side after 180 degree rotation shows four drawer fronts with original handles
each drawer front carries its source mesh patch and a generated backing tray
fixed body keeps all non-drawer source mesh triangles and receives generated cabinet rails behind the openings
design_intent.notes: The source 3MF is a one-piece MakerLab Image to 3D v2 mesh with 490,290 facets; output parts must account for every source triangle exactly once.

mesh_preservation.notes: Canonical orientation matches the corrected Bambu render made with --rotate 180 --camera-view 1.

front_patch_includes: original cross-hatch and line surface relief

patch_masks.name: drawer_1_front
patch_masks.notes: Upper cross-hatched drawer front and handle on the corrected front side.

patch_masks.name: drawer_4_front
patch_masks.notes: Lower cross-hatched drawer front and handle.

drawer_stack.notes: Masks use source mesh coordinates before the canonical 180 degree Z rotation; all selected triangles move to drawer parts, all remaining source triangles stay on the fixed body.

requirements: Preserve every original source mesh triangle exactly once across output parts.
Do not redraw, smooth, decimate, or replace the visible drawing-derived mesh.
Make the four visible drawer fronts with handles separate removable drawers.
Add only functional backing, cabinet rails, and tray geometry behind the preserved mesh patches.
notes: Source mesh dimensions from Bambu Studio are approximately 100.0 x 49.95 x 93.25 mm.
STL and 3MF are the authoritative mesh-preserved outputs; STEP is not emitted for the triangle mesh skin.
